instruction:
Find a polar equation for the ellipse that has its focus at the pole and satisfies the stated conditions. Enter t for the variable $\theta$.
(a) Directrix to the right of the pole; $b=$ 5 and $e=\frac{3}{5}$. Equation of the ellipse is $r=$ [ANS]
(b) Directrix below the pole; $c=$ 6 and $e=\frac{1}{4}$. Equation of the ellipse is $r=$ [ANS]
